summary: "Hunt LLM/AI feature bugs — prompt injection, indirect injection, exfiltration via tool-use/markdown, ASCII smuggling, agentic AI security (OWASP Agentic Apps 2026, ASI01-ASI10). Patterns: direct inje
preconditions: Skill hunt-llm-ai has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching hunt-llm-ai
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
